name: Bank of Evergreen
description_short: Independent community bank established in 1932 serving Evergreen, AL with personal and business checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services.
description_long: Bank of Evergreen was founded in 1932 during the Great Depression to serve the Evergreen and Conecuh County communities. The bank remains locally owned, operated, and managed as an independent community institution. In a significant modernization effort, the bank relocated to its current location at 146 West Front Street, where it renovated the historic former Pix Theater and adjacent storefronts, preserving architectural features from the original movie house in the lobby. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking services including checking accounts, savings accounts, consumer loans, certificates of deposit, and credit cards. For business customers, Bank of Evergreen provides commercial checking, depository services, payroll check cashing, ACH services, and night depository access. All customers benefit from digital services including internet banking, mobile banking, 24-hour ATMs, Visa debit cards, remote deposit capture, and direct deposit capabilities. What distinguishes Bank of Evergreen is its deep local roots and community focus spanning over 90 years of continuous operation. Unlike national or regional chains, this institution makes decisions locally and reinvests in the Evergreen community. The bank's commitment to modernization—evidenced by its current digital banking offerings and recent facility renovation—demonstrates it balances traditional community banking values with contemporary financial technology. Bank of Evergreen is best suited for residents and small business owners in the Evergreen, AL area who value local decision-making and community banking relationships. However, customers should note that the bank appears to have limited online account opening capabilities (marked "Coming Soon") and operates from a single physical location, which may restrict accessibility for those outside the immediate service area.
pros: Locally owned and independently operated with 90+ years of community service since 1932
Full-service offerings including personal checking, savings, business accounts, and consumer loans
Modern digital banking capabilities including internet banking, mobile banking, and remote deposit capture
Extended service hours with 24-hour ATM access and night depository for businesses
Comprehensive business services including ACH, payroll check cashing, and commercial automation tools
Enterprise-grade encryption and security for sensitive business and personal data
Historic community connection with renovated main lobby featuring original Pix Theater architecture
cons: Online account opening is not yet available (marked "Coming Soon" on website)
Single physical location in Evergreen, AL limits accessibility for customers outside the immediate area
No mention of FDIC insurance status, deposit limits, or regulatory disclosures on available website content
Limited information about loan products, terms, rates, or credit card offerings details
No indication of partnership with other ATM networks for nationwide access beyond their own 24-hour ATMs
best_for: Evergreen, AL and Conecuh County residents seeking community-focused personal banking
Local small business owners needing business checking, payroll services, and ACH capabilities
Customers who value local decision-making and relationship-based banking over large national institutions
Business users requiring internet banking automation and secure data handling for commercial operations
diagnosis: Bank of Evergreen is ideal for Evergreen, AL area residents and small business owners who prioritize local community banking relationships and modern digital convenience. The main caveat is that online account opening remains unavailable and the bank operates from a single location, making it impractical for customers outside the immediate service area or those requiring extensive geographic access.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
